text:
miwi        2009-03-12 16:51:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Mixin-Linewise Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  With Mixin::Linewise::Readers and Mixin::Linewise::Writers, you can just write
  a method to handle handles, and methods for handling strings and filenames are
  added for you.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/~rjbs/Mixin-Linewise/
  
  PR:             ports/132495
  Submitted by:   bapt <baptiste.daroussin at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3399    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/devel/p5-Mixin-Linewise/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Mixin-Linewise/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Mixin-Linewise/pkg-descr (new)
